name: Θ Hidden Forbidden In Heat
author: ᵂᶤʳᵉᵈ
description: Inhabited by the three goddesses who manage every desire in the world‚ Sugar Mansion Sif Berg is home to countless doors․ By opening and closing these doors‚ one can control the desires that flow throughout the world․ Rumors claim that every now and then‚ you can see the face of someone suffering in the lava․ These faces belong to players who have fallen into a coma․ Faithfully recreated from ․hack⁄⁄GU Last Recode
